Vaibhav Suryavanshi India’s Most-Searched Cricketer 2025

Dec 6, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Vaibhav Suryavanshi India’s Most-Searched Cricketer 2025

Vaibhav Suryavanshi has emerged as India’s most-searched cricketer of 2025, surpassing veteran stars Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma. The 14-year-old batting prodigy rose to prominence during the IPL 2025, making headlines with his explosive stroke play and record-breaking innings.

Suryavanshi scored 252 runs in seven matches for Rajasthan Royals after being bought for ₹1.1 crore, including the second-fastes …
